name: crossmodal-retrieval
description: Train multimodal encoders using contrastive learning that map images and text into shared space for cross-modal retrieval.
keywords: contrastive learning, cross-modal, retrieval, multimodal, similarity
content:
## Cross-modal Retrieval with Contrastive Learning

Contrastive learning pulls similar modalities (image+caption) together and pushes dissimilar ones apart.

### Core Concept

Contrastive learning pulls similar modalities (image+caption) together and pushes dissimilar ones apart. This enables efficient model development and deployment.
